Qualia Creatine+ unlocks creatine’s full potential for supporting muscle strength, brain health, and healthy aging, with unrivaled scientific precision.
 Doctor-formulated with 2 rigorously studied creatine forms.
 Helps promote strength & build lean muscle.\

Supplement Facts & Ingredients

Fast Shipping
Money Back Guarantee
Looking to order more? Click here to change quantity
Sharp & Strong Start Here.
What to Expect
Health Benefits We Expect You’ll Notice From Qualia Creatine+
Strength Benefits [...] Qualia Creatine+ Ingredients
OptiCreatine™ Creatine Monohydrate
OptiCreatine™ supplies the world’s most studied form of creatine—creatine monohydrate—in a highly pure, micronized form “optimized” to dissolve better with less grit and clumping than typical powders. This helps overcome common issues with creatine monohydrate, including poor dissolution, gritty texture, and sedimentation.\
Creatine MagnaPower® (Magnesium Creatine Chelate)
Creatine converts to phosphocreatine in brain and muscle cells, using ATP bound to magnesium. Phosphocreatine serves as a rapid energy reserve for high-intensity activity, from weightlifting to intense thinking. Creatine MagnaPower® combines creatine with magnesium in a unique chelated form to support peak muscle and brain performance.\
Sea Salt [...] Qualia Creatine+ combines three ingredients—OptiCreatine™ Creatine Monohydrate, Creatine MagnaPower® (a magnesium creatine chelate), and sea salt. The two creatine forms help quickly replenish ATP, the body’s universal energy currency. Magnesium supports this ATP process, while sea salt supports creatine transport into cells in the brain, muscles, and intestines.\
What benefits should I expect when taking Qualia Creatine+?
+
The best-known benefits of creatine supplements like Qualia Creatine+ include enhanced muscle strength, size, and recovery, along with better performance during high-intensity exercise. Qualia Creatine+ also nourishes brain energy and function—some people may notice support for focus, memory, mental clarity, sustained energy, and overall mood.\

## Learn More About The Other 24 Ingredients
+
Sabroxy® (Oroxylum indicum bark extract) is made from the dried bark of the Indian trumpet tree/ (Oroxylum indicum). It supports healthy brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF) function, helping to maintain neurological health and nerve functions. Sabroxy contains a flavonoid called oroxylin-A that supports healthy dopamine signaling which supports motivation and focus.\ [...] Saffron Stigma Extract
A spice derived from the dried stigmata of the plant Crocus sativus. It has a number of benefits for the brain, including optimizing the reuptake by neurons of some neurotransmitters (e.g., dopamine, serotonin) and activity of others (e.g., GABA, glutamate).\
Lutein & Zeaxanthin (from Lutemax Brain marigold flower extract)
Lutein and zeaxanthin are carotenoids best known for supporting eye health, but they are also brain–essential nutrients, playing important roles in supporting neuroprotection, neuronal communication, brain network connectivity, and the health of brain white and gray matter.\
Rhodiola rosea Root Extract

Reishi Mushroom
Often called “the mushroom of immortality”, Ganoderma lucidum (commonly known as Reishi mushroom), has been used for centuries in Traditional Chinese Medicine under the name “Lingzhi” in shen tonic, which was used to promote peace of mind, sound sleep, and clear thinking. Modern research on reishi mushrooms also indicates support for sleep, as well as immune function.

Servings Per Container: 2 [...] FISETIN
Fisetin is a flavonol found in certain fruits and vegetables, such as strawberries and persimmon. Like quercetin, it was one of the first senolytic ingredients ever discovered, and boasts one of the most impressive bodies of research of all senolytics. Fisetin has been strongly correlated with supporting body tissues by helping with pruning of stressed cells.
LUTEOLIN
Luteolin is a yellow plant pigment used for centuries as a yellow dye. In fact, the latin name for yellow is luteus. Luteolin has a very similar molecular structure to quercetin, and much like fisetin, luteolin has also shown evidence of senolytic properties by helping to manage senescent cell elimination.

CyanthOx™ is an extract from sea buckhorn fruit (native to Tibet) which has been clinically studied for supporting the mobilization of stem cell types involved in the body’s healthy self-healing and self-renewal functions, including progenitor stem cells, endothelial stem cells, and lymphocytoid mesenchymal stem cells.\
Alomac® (Aloe macroclada extract)
Aloe macroclada is native to Madagascar,where it has been used by the Malagasy people for centuries to support natural healing and to promote rejuvenation and longevity. Alomac®, a standardized extract, has been studied for supporting healthy stem cell functions in humans, where it enhanced hematopoietic stem cells up 53%.\

In Qualia Senolytic: Fisetin is a flavonol found in certain fruits and vegetables, such as strawberries and persimmon. Like quercetin, it was one of the first senolytic ingredients ever discovered, and boasts one of the most impressive bodies of research of all senolytics.
